description: 將已凍結的 unified lesson view contract 搬到 Flutter。必須先通過 Architecture, Modular Refactor, KLab Refactor, 與 Runtime Mock Verification 四大門檻後方可開始。

tasks.desc: Confirm transfer gate prerequisites: Architecture frozen, Modular Viewer refactored, Knowledge Lab Viewer refactored, and Runtime Mock Verification completed.
Freeze the Flutter shell contract for unified lesson view, including screen layout, panel regions, and the minimum runtime entry points needed by the view.
Map the frozen unified lesson view contract into Flutter state models, preserving primary/support surface separation and explicit selection state.
Implement Flutter adapters for primary content surfaces, covering video, dialogue, and article rendering entry points without weakening the contract.
Implement Flutter adapters for support detail surfaces, covering knowledge lab grammar, pattern, usage, and vocab panels with consistent loading and empty states.
Wire data and adapter boundaries for mock/staging sources, making sure the Flutter shell can run against frozen mock data before live content is attached.
Add QA and regression checks for loading, fallback, missing metadata, and panel switching behavior across the Flutter implementation.
Document handoff notes and remaining implementation gaps so the Flutter transfer can be reviewed against the frozen unified lesson view contract.
